list.title: Agents
list.subtitle: Create a project workspace and chat with an agent that can read and update files, research your knowledge, and run code.
list.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
list.emptyLead: Each project is a workspace folder with its own files, chat sessions, and agent instructions.

chat.hero: Ask the agent to explore files, plan work, or research your knowledge base.

settings.title: Agent settings
settings.hint: Configure subagents, skills, and defaults. Saved to the project and .openkms/config.json.
